proof:
funext n m
  have L1 k : myAdd' zero k = k := by
    induction k with
    | zero => rfl
    | succ k ih => simp [ih]
  have L2 a k : myAdd' (succ a) k = succ (myAdd' a k) := by
    induction k with
    | zero => rfl
    | succ k ih => simp [ih]
  induction n with
  | zero => simp [L1]
  | succ n ih => simp [L2, ih]
successful_attempts:
funext n m
  have L1 k : myAdd' zero k = k := by
    induction k with
    | zero => rfl
    | succ k ih => simp [ih]
  have L2 a k : myAdd' (succ a) k = succ (myAdd' a k) := by
    induction k with
    | zero => rfl
    | succ k ih => simp [ih]
  induction n with
  | zero => simp [L1]
  | succ n ih => simp [L2, ih]
